# Pawfect Beauty

> Women-owned luxury dog grooming salon in Las Vegas, NV. Professional grooming services by Mihsha (18+ years experience) and Jenny (14 years experience).

## Business Info

- **Name:** Pawfect Beauty
- **Address:** 8665 W Flamingo Rd Ste 105, Las Vegas, NV 89147
- **Phone:** (702) 954-6226
- **Email:** Pawfectbeautylv@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://pawfectbeauty.com
- **Hours:** Tuesday–Saturday, 8 AM–4 PM. Closed Sunday and Monday.

## Services

- **Full Groom** ($65–$120+): Bath, custom haircut, ear cleaning, nail trim & dremel, tidy paws, sanitary trim, anal gland expression
- **Bath & Tidy** ($55–$110+): Bath, brush-out, ear cleaning, nail trim & dremel, anal gland expression, light face & rear touch-up
- **Bath & Nails** ($50–$100+): Bath, gentle brushing, ear cleaning, nail trim & file, anal gland expression

## Add-Ons

- Express Service: $20
- Specialty Shampoos: $5–$10
- Teeth Brushing: $5

## Walk-In Services

- Nail Trim & Dremel: $10 (large dogs $15)
- Anal Gland Expression: $5
- Teeth Brushing: $5

## Team

- **Mihsha** — Owner & Head Groomer, 18+ years experience
- **Jenny** — Owner & Head Groomer, 14 years experience (specializes in senior, nervous, and feisty dogs)

## Notes

- All vaccine records required at drop-off
- Walk-ins welcome (subject to availability)
- Book online: https://groomer.io/salon-booking/pawfectbeautyluxurygrooming

## Pages

- / Home page — dog grooming salon overview, services summary, testimonials
- /services/ Dog grooming services offered
- /pricing/ Transparent pricing by dog size
- /about/ Meet Mihsha and Jenny
- /faq/ Booking, vaccines, anxious dogs, grooming frequency
- /contact/ Location, map, contact form
